proposals.title: If a player was played by a manager and is later waived/fired for non-medical reason, that manager loses 5 points from their final score for the week
proposals.current: No rule

comments.author: Multiple
comments.text: Too hard to keep track of. We aren't trusting you to track it.

comments.author: Multiple
comments.text: Amendment — 50 points: Yes: Stephen, Joes, Griff

proposals.title: With a team's first pick of the offseason draft, each owner must announce their pick in NFL style: 'With the X pick in the 1st round of the QPFL Draft, [team] selects [player]'
proposals.current: No rule

comments.author: Griff
comments.text: Not gonna lie gents, I thought of this more than a couple beers deep and thought it was funny. It'd also be a cool way to hear the new team names after the offseason. I think it would get annoying if we did it with more than one round.

comments.author: Connor
comments.text: And take a shot (reasonably). Yes: Griff, Stephen, Anagh, Arnav, Spencer, Ryan, Connor — No: Bill, Joes

comments.author: Kaminska
comments.text: Sure, this will literally never effect me

proposals.title: If a coach is on your roster on the day that they're fired, you lose 5 points the week of the matchup
proposals.current: Head coaches who are started the week before their firing are -5 points the next week

comments.author: Griff
comments.text: We often speculate pretty hard about coaches getting fired, this is a way for us to put our money where our mouth is. Robert Saleh (2-3) fired after Week 5 — not on a roster. Dennis Allen (2-7) fired after Week 9 — not on a roster. Matt Eberflus (4-8) fired after Week 13 — was on Connor's roster, but Connor lost that week by 7 points so no playoff impact.

comments.author: Griff
comments.text: If we don't pass this rule, we should change the existing rule to have the coach's points removed the last week they coach the team, not the following week.

proposals.title: Travis Hunter gets points for interceptions, fumble recoveries, sacks, and TDs like defenses
proposals.current: No rule

comments.author: Multiple
comments.text: Fuck no lmao. Historically when WRs do interceptions in Hail Mary situations they don't get the points. Don't give Travis Hunter any special consideration.

proposals.title: Move the league to Sleeper
proposals.current: Not on Sleeper

comments.author: Multiple
comments.text: PLEASE

proposals.title: Votes of owners not at the draft count as half
proposals.current: No rule

proposals.title: Move the league to Sleeper
proposals.current: Not on Sleeper

comments.author: Griff
comments.text: The primary difference I've seen is that we couldn't have coaches (or OL if that passes).

comments.author: Reardon
comments.text: Don't really care either way, I like the offline part, but I think Sleeper would make it easier for the league to stay active.

comments.author: Arnav
comments.text: Don't care but we do get some charm with Google

proposals.title: Remove the rule where missed FGs of 60+ yards are not minus points
proposals.current: Missed FGs are 0 points if from 60+ yards

comments.author: Griff
comments.text: This is annoying to score since I have to go find the distance in the play by play.

comments.author: Reardon
comments.text: Make Griffin's life more annoying and make more options that he has to check.

comments.author: Arnav
comments.text: Whatever is easier

proposals.title: Make FG misses -2 points
proposals.current: FGs missed are -1, XP missed are -2

comments.author: Griff
comments.text: Kicker scores are substantially higher now, kickers have missed 3 FGs in a game and still have 5+ points. Honestly dislike that XP misses are less — giving the other team the ball instead of getting points feels substantially worse.

comments.author: Reardon
comments.text: I think lost points should be based on the distance of the miss but this would be annoying for Griff to score so I'm very for it.

comments.author: Arnav
comments.text: Whatever is easier

proposals.title: Add a 5th receiver slot prior to the 2025 season
proposals.current: There are 4 receivers

comments.author: Arnav
comments.text: Tbh I kinda like this cuz it's chaotic

comments.author: Multiple
comments.text: Voting no, would like to see a flex position added instead

proposals.title: Add a flex position (RB/WR/TE) prior to the 2025 season
proposals.current: No flex position

comments.author: Griff
comments.text: I'm worried about having depth of talent available at RB/TE if the flex position is added. There aren't 50 good RBs in the NFL.

proposals.title: Start 2 QBs
proposals.current: 1 QB starter

comments.author: Multiple
comments.text: I hate super flex. Not a superflex — double starters (dual shotgun) — that's literally the same thing. I don't have 2 QBs. Sucks to suck.

comments.author: Reardon
comments.text: Fuck no

proposals.title: Give the season's primary punishment to the loser of the regular season (also gets the #1 pick). Loser of the toilet bowl must complete a beer mile with witness; puking is grounds for disqualification.
proposals.current: No punishment for loser of the regular season, just the loser of the toilet tournament

comments.author: Griff
comments.text: Discourages tanking

comments.author: Arnav
comments.text: What if we got them to do a duo sexy calendar

proposals.title: O-Line added as a position. Each team has 2 O-lines. Scoring: +1 per 50 rush yds, +1 per 100 pass yds, -1 per sack, +6 for lineman TD. Draft via randomized snake.
proposals.current: No O-Line position (vote originally passed in 2023, revisited before the 2024 season)

proposals.title: Coach points are ½ points per win differential in wins and ¼ points in losses
proposals.current: Existing coach scoring

comments.author: Arnav
comments.text: If we add complexity via the offensive line, I don't want to make things more difficult for Griff. Coaches are good as is.

comments.author: Joe
comments.text: Coaches seem irrelevant. Open to more ideas on how to increase complexity in the coaching position.

proposals.title: Last week's lineup defaults as your next week's lineup
proposals.current: No default lineup

comments.author: Arnav
comments.text: Nah — it'll disincentivize engagement with the league

proposals.title: Punishment for not submitting lineup: video formal apology to league in formal attire
proposals.current: No punishment

comments.author: Arnav
comments.text: As the current punishment guy, I actually think a sexy calendar is pretty light touch punishment (we should talk about costs tho).

comments.author: Kaminska
comments.text: Keep the calendar, I think it's hilarious

proposals.title: Suspend QB Deshaun Watson (CLE) for life
proposals.current: No players are banned for life

proposals.title: Change the last place punishment
proposals.current: Waffle House

comments.author: Yoder/Kaminska/Joe/Bill/Censored Ward/Arnav
comments.text: Make a sexy calendar and distribute it to every member of the league

comments.author: Griff
comments.text: Go on a dinner date with a LARGE stuffed animal and talk to it all evening

comments.author: Connor
comments.text: Sign up for and race in a D3 open track meet (anyone can) and race the 2 mile event

proposals.title: Interceptions should be -3 or -4 points to QB scores
proposals.current: Interceptions that aren't returned for touchdowns are -2 points

proposals.title: Pick 6 should be -6 points to QB scores
proposals.current: Pick 6s are total -5 points (-3 points in addition to the -2 from the pick)

proposals.title: Non-QB players should get 1pt per 10 yards when throwing (e.g. RB throws 30 yards = 3 points)
proposals.current: All players get 1 point per 25 yards passing regardless of position

comments.author: Kaminska
comments.text: Hell No

proposals.title: Longer field goals worth more points — scales same way as currently but doesn't max out at 4
proposals.current: Field goal points max out at 4 points for any length 50+ yards

proposals.title: Sacks count as negative rushing yards
proposals.current: Sacks only count as points for defense

proposals.title: Switch the midseason draft order to reflect current standings at the time of the draft
proposals.current: Draft order reflects standings from the previous season

proposals.title: (Censored Ward Rule) If the league's Sacko punishment isn't completed by the start of the season, that team automatically loses every week until the punishment is completed
proposals.current: No enforcement mechanism for the punishment

proposals.title: If a potential rule change fails, it requires unanimous consent if proposed again the next season (Sleeper vote exempted)
proposals.current: Any owner can propose a rule change every offseason

proposals.title: Migrate the QPFL to the Sleeper App
proposals.current: Major changes would include removal of the HC position and top halves worth a full point instead of half a point

proposals.title: Switch kicker negative points: missing extra point is -2 points, missing field goal is -1 points
proposals.current: Missed FG is -2 points, missed XP is -1

proposals.title: Make missed FG above 60 yards 0 pts (as opposed to negative points)
proposals.current: Missed FG above 60 yards is negative points

proposals.title: Connor Kaminska is the Sacko Commissioner
proposals.current: Commish leads

proposals.title: Give kickoff return TDs and punt return TDs 4 pts via DEFENSE (change to DEFENSE/ST)
proposals.current: No point values for return TDs

proposals.title: Last place in the regular season gets both the top pick and the punishment; loser of the toilet tournament pays for the punishment (buy-in lowered by $5 for everyone, max $50)
proposals.current: $50 budget paid for by league dues

proposals.title: O-Line added as a position. Each team has 2 O-lines. Scoring: +1 per 50 rush yds, +1 per 100 pass yds, -1 per sack, +6 for lineman TD. Additional snake draft for 2023 offseason.
proposals.current: O-Line does not exist as a position

comments.author: Note
comments.text: This vote originally passed, and was revisited before the 2024 season

proposals.title: Rank Points adjusted to being wins + 0.5(top half)
proposals.current: Rank points were calculated as wins + top half

proposals.title: Punishment decided by a 'loser's tournament' among the bottom four teams over the same weeks as the playoffs
proposals.current: Punishment was also decided by the standings

proposals.title: Increase the buy-in to $32 with remaining funds going to shipping/updating the trophy
proposals.current: Buy-in was $20. Loser's punishment and trophy maintenance were not covered.
